package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for migration_runner_and_api_server_bootstrap_coupled: One startup path that always runs migrations and serves traffic together.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule095NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule095NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule095NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario095Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule095NegativeService, input Rule095NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
